name: Jellied Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. For the bottom layer, heat tomato juice to boiling.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water; dissolve it in hot tomato juice.
3. Add lemon juice, onion, celery, catsup, and salt to the mixture.
4. Pour into a mold and refrigerate until set.
5. For the top layer, soften gelatin in cold water; dissolve it in hot water.
6. Add cottage cheese and mayonnaise to the mixture.
7. Pour over the congealed first layer.
8. Chill until the entire salad is firm.
Serves 10
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
Edited by billspa@icanect.net
